name: content-creator-default
description: Suggested policy preset for the content-creator-agent starter. Sized for a typical short-form video or post (3-5 paid assets).
notes: $3 approval threshold catches anything more expensive than a typical stock asset or single AI generation call.
Cumulative spend per project can stack — the system prompt asks the agent to surface running cost so you can pause before hitting the cap.
Allowlisted services (gates which registered stock + AI gen providers the agent may pay) are managed in the Canopy dashboard.
